capabilities.name: Official MCP Registry
capabilities.description: Canonical public registry source for MCP server metadata.
useWhen: Need to discover trusted public MCP servers.
capabilities.loadCommand: Review registry metadata before adding a server.

capabilities.name: mcp-agent router/evaluator
capabilities.description: Router and evaluator-optimizer patterns for future tool-selection experiments.
useWhen: Need to benchmark or improve tool-selection quality.
capabilities.loadCommand: Use as a future spike, not a v1 runtime dependency.

capabilities.name: awesome-mcp-servers
capabilities.description: Broad community catalog for candidate MCP servers and gateway ideas.
useWhen: Need ideas for additional MCP servers after local catalog coverage.
capabilities.loadCommand: Treat as discovery input, not as trusted execution config.
